_about: Kiln-managed Nango integration definitions (config-as-code). Secrets are referenced by ENV VAR NAME, never value (invariant #7). `./kiln.sh nango:export` writes this from a live Nango; `./kiln.sh nango:apply` recreates it on whatever NANGO_HOST/NANGO_SECRET_KEY your .env points at. Connections (authorized accounts) are NOT migrated — re-authorize on the target. Edit this file by hand or regenerate it with nango:export. Commit it to git.
